channel.title: Race Chasers
channel.description: Race Chasers takes you inside professional bike races from the perspective of professional photographers Zac Williams and Harry Talbot.
channel.itunes:author: Escape Collective
channel.itunes:summary: Race Chasers takes you inside professional bike races from the perspective of professional photographers Zac Williams and Harry Talbot.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Race Chasers takes you inside professional bike races from the perspective of professional photographers Zac Williams and Harry Talbot.
channel.itunes:keywords: Tour de France, cycling, pro cycling, bike, bike racing, bicycles, photograhy, cycling photography, photos, camera

item.title: Ep. 7: Season recap, Waking up in Woking and Zac’s revenge tour
item.itunes:title: Ep. 7: Season recap, Waking up in Woking and Zac’s revenge tour
item.description: In this episode of Race Chasers, Harry and Zac are back staring into one another’s eyes in the flesh! In our last in-person-record of the year we recap our season’s, bring you our 5 favourite images of the year and regale tall tales from Gravel Worlds, il Lombardia and The McLaren Technology centre!
item.content:encoded: In this episode of Race Chasers, Harry and Zac are back staring into one another’s eyes in the flesh! In our last in-person-record of the year we recap our season’s, bring you our 5 favourite images of the year and regale tall tales from Gravel Worlds, il Lombardia and The McLaren Technology centre!
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: In this episode of Race Chasers, Harry and Zac are back staring into one another’s eyes in the flesh! In our last in-person-record of the year we recap our season’s, bring you our 5 favourite images of the year and regale tall tales from Gravel Worlds, il Lombardia and The McLaren Technology centre!
item.itunes:keywords: Tour de France, cycling, pro cycling, bike, bike racing, bicycles, photograhy, cycling photography, photos, camera

item.title: Ep. 6: Chaos in Kigali and the real Felix gall
item.itunes:title: Ep. 6: Chaos in Kigali and the real Felix gall
item.description: Join Zac and Harry as they debrief the Vuelta, dive into Zac’s reflections on Rwandan Worlds and most importantly of all, discuss the greatest cycling event on the international calendar - the Team Time Trial Mixed Relay.
item.content:encoded: Join Zac and Harry as they debrief the Vuelta, dive into Zac’s reflections on Rwandan Worlds and most importantly of all, discuss the greatest cycling event on the international calendar - the Team Time Trial Mixed Relay.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Join Zac and Harry as they debrief the Vuelta, dive into Zac’s reflections on Rwandan Worlds and most importantly of all, discuss the greatest cycling event on the international calendar - the Team Time Trial Mixed Relay.
item.itunes:keywords: Tour de France, cycling, pro cycling, bike, bike racing, bicycles, photograhy, cycling photography, photos, camera

item.title: Ep. 5: Mercadona Hamburgers and Jonas Rickaert
item.itunes:title: Ep. 5: Mercadona Hamburgers and Jonas Rickaert
item.description: Join Zac and Harry for the final week of this wild Vuelta! They delve deep into the remarkable world of Mercadona’s take-away department, stoked to the brim with morale and spiritual enlightenment that’s needed to survive the depths of the third week of the third grand tour. They also talk cycling photography and race goings on too - because they have to.
item.content:encoded: Join Zac and Harry for the final week of this wild Vuelta! They delve deep into the remarkable world of Mercadona’s take-away department, stoked to the brim with morale and spiritual enlightenment that’s needed to survive the depths of the third week of the third grand tour. They also talk cycling photography and race goings on too - because they have to.
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: Join Zac and Harry for the final week of this wild Vuelta! They delve deep into the remarkable world of Mercadona’s take-away department, stoked to the brim with morale and spiritual enlightenment that’s needed to survive the depths of the third week of the third grand tour. They also talk cycling photography and race goings on too - because they have to.
item.itunes:keywords: Tour de France, cycling, pro cycling, bike, bike racing, bicycles, photograhy, cycling photography, photos, camera

item.title: Ep. 4: Chaos reigns, Vuelta remains
item.itunes:title: Ep. 4: Chaos reigns, Vuelta remains
item.description: In this episode of the Race Chasers podcast, Zac and Harry recount their most eventful and challenging week on a grand tour yet, where else, but the Vuelta?!? Protests stopping stages, getting the car stuck, Air BnB hosts untimely deaths, lemon being squeezed over paella! All this and more in episode 4 of Race Chasers!
item.content:encoded: In this episode of the Race Chasers podcast, Zac and Harry recount their most eventful and challenging week on a grand tour yet, where else, but the Vuelta?!? Protests stopping stages, getting the car stuck, Air BnB hosts untimely deaths, lemon being squeezed over paella! All this and more in episode 4 of Race Chasers!
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: In this episode of the Race Chasers podcast, Zac and Harry recount their most eventful and challenging week on a grand tour yet, where else, but the Vuelta?!? Protests stopping stages, getting the car stuck, Air BnB hosts untimely deaths, lemon being squeezed over paella! All this and more in episode 4 of Race Chasers!
item.itunes:keywords: Tour de France, cycling, pro cycling, bike, bike racing, bicycles, photograhy, cycling photography, photos, camera

item.title: Ep. 3: Vuelta Vibes
item.itunes:title: Ep. 3: Vuelta Vibes
item.description: After much apologising and explanation, Harry and Zac are back! This time from the first rest day of La Vuelta. We talk (dis)organisation, Big Starts in foreign lands, rider trivia, and weigh in on that Juan name on everyone’s lips. With plenty of photo chat in between, join us for a look back on the week that’s been and what we’ve been up to, while 10 days into the Third Grand Tour of our season!
item.content:encoded: After much apologising and explanation, Harry and Zac are back! This time from the first rest day of La Vuelta. We talk (dis)organisation, Big Starts in foreign lands, rider trivia, and weigh in on that Juan name on everyone’s lips. With plenty of photo chat in between, join us for a look back on the week that’s been and what we’ve been up to, while 10 days into the Third Grand Tour of our season!
item.author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:author: Escape Collective
item.itunes:summary: After much apologising and explanation, Harry and Zac are back! This time from the first rest day of La Vuelta. We talk (dis)organisation, Big Starts in foreign lands, rider trivia, and weigh in on that Juan name on everyone’s lips. With plenty of photo chat in between, join us for a look back on the week that’s been and what we’ve been up to, while 10 days into the Third Grand Tour of our season!
item.itunes:keywords: Tour de France, cycling, pro cycling, bike, bike racing, bicycles, photograhy, cycling photography, photos, camera

item.title: Ep. 2: Pyrénean point and shoot
item.itunes:title: Ep. 2: Pyrénean point and shoot
item.description: Zac and Harry dive into the second week of the 2025 Tour, complete with haystacks, traffic jams, French evening greetings and some photos in between.
item.content:encoded: Zac and Harry dive into the second week of the 2025 Tour, complete with haystacks, traffic jams, French evening greetings and some photos in between.
item.author: Escape Collective

item.itunes:title: Ep. 1: We're at the Tour de France
item.description: Zac and Harry come to you from the first rest day of the Tour de France.
